title: STOREMIC Floating Shelves, White Shelves with Length 60cm, Set of 2 Wall Shelves, Easy to Install Decorative Shelf with Large Storage for Bedroom, Bathroom, Home Office, Living Room
features: Sturdy Floating Shelves--Made of MDF board, the internal structure is uniform and the performance is stable, and the physical index does not change much under different environments to avoid deformation. Strong enough to hold any small items you want

Simple & Modern Design-- The structure in a straight line is simple and clear, which maximizes the utilization of space. The fashionable design can not only enhance the aesthetic charm of the house but also provide pleasant decoration to suit a range of modern interiors

Functional Wall Shelves--The versatile floating shelves are useful for creating more space to display and store favorite belongings like books, CDs, picture frames, or small potted plants, etc. Perfect for kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, living room and more

Easy Assembly--The wall floating shelves are simple to install because of all mounting hardware and instructions on how to put them up included. You just need to fix it with the provided 38 screws (Please check below about the screw information of the shelves)

Suitable for Different Walls --A variety of fixings are provided for different wall types. You just need to choose a suitable one to install. Same Size:60X 17X 3 cm/ 23.6’’X 6.7’’X 1.2’’. These shelves are wider and most of the competitor option giving a wonderful decoration and great addition to any wall space
description: Product Description Are you fretting about the messy countertop in the living room ? No room to display skin care products in bathroom/ bedroom ? Is it difficult for you to find seasoning bottles or jars in kitchen ? STOREMIC floating shelves will help you with all purpose ! Display picture frames and art pieces on the floating shelves to decorate the wall to make your living room more beautiful and warm that is comfortably livable. Showcase trophies and accolades near the fireplace, use in the kitchen to hold spices and jars. Exhibit family photos gallery style in a long hallway or install in the bedroom or bathroom to hold beauty/hair products, place under a mirror in the entryway.
